entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `summary` TEXT NOT NULL, `imageUrl` TEXT, `newsSite` TEXT NOT NULL, `publishedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `url` TEXT NOT NULL, `featured` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

indices.name: index_articles_publishedAt
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_articles_publishedAt` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`publishedAt`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`articleId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `prevKey` INTEGER, `nextKey` INTEGER, `lastFetchedAt` INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(`articleId`))

indices.name: index_remote_keys_lastFetchedAt
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_remote_keys_lastFetchedAt` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`lastFetchedAt`)

entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`title` TEXT NOT NULL, `summary` TEXT NOT NULL, content=`articles`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_articles_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `articles` BEGIN DELETE FROM `articles_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_articles_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `articles` BEGIN DELETE FROM `articles_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_articles_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `articles` BEGIN INSERT INTO `articles_fts`(`docid`, `title`, `summary`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`, NEW.`summary`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_articles_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `articles` BEGIN INSERT INTO `articles_fts`(`docid`, `title`, `summary`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`, NEW.`summary`); END

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
